name: ffprobe-metadata-wasm
description: FFprobe WASM for browser - video/audio metadata probe only, Worker mode, no SharedArrayBuffer required

scripts.build:wasm: docker build -t ffprobe-metadata-wasm . && docker run --rm -v "$(pwd)/dist:/out" ffprobe-metadata-wasm cp /build/dist/ffprobe-wasm.js /build/dist/ffprobe-wasm.wasm /out/
